gauge.name: Laguna de Santa Rosa near Sebastopol

impacts.statement: Minor Flooding.  Occidental Road begins flooding near the channel margin.  NWS will issue an Urban/Small Stream Advisory, if not yet already issued.
Monitor Stage.  NWS may issue a Flash Flood Watch, if not yet already issued.

dataAttribution.text: USGS--Water Resources of the United States
dataAttribution.title: US Geological Survey
Observations courtesy of U.S. Geological Survey

gauge.forecastReliability: Forecasts are not available. Only observed stages are available for this point.
